title: workflow-automation choose-capability capability_mismatch
summary: Agent was asked to build a full dashboard application in one task. It produced a partial implementation that mixed frontend, backend, and data pipeline code.

evidence.desired_outcome: Build a data dashboard with charts, filters, and a backend API serving live metrics.
evidence.symptom: The generated code mixes frontend components, API routes, and data transformation logic in a single file. The result is incomplete and unrunnable.
evidence.context: The dashboard requires three distinct components: (1) frontend UI, (2) backend API, (3) data processing pipeline.
evidence.failed_step: Generated monolithic code that cannot be run as-is
reproduction_steps: Generated full-stack code in one file — unrunnable
Attempted to split into components mid-generation — structure became inconsistent

inference.why_current_path_failed: The task is too large for a single tool path. The agent needs to decompose it into independent sub-tasks.
inference.best_candidate_route_detail: Split into three phases: (1) Design the data model and API contract, (2) Build the backend API, (3) Build the frontend.
